name: afda-booking-platform
description: AFDA Booking Platform - Complete booking system for AFDA students and staff

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace app run dev" "npm --workspace server run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace @afda/app run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace server run lint && npm --workspace @afda/app run lint
scripts.type-check: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace @afda/app run type-check
